summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing enablement programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can drive behavior change and measurable outcomes—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Own end-to-end {prog|enablement} program roadmaps for 20+ initiatives, translating priorities into training, playbooks, and reinforcement
Design and deliver high-quality {prog|learning experiences}—live sessions, workshops, and self-serve resources—for 600+ participants
Build and maintain {prog|playbooks, guides, and templates}, partnering {cross|cross-functionally} with Marketing, Tech, and Sales
Establish {data|measurement and feedback loops} (readiness, adoption, enrollment), driving a 78% program enrollment rate via {ex|behavior change}
Diagnosed {ex|performance gaps} by analyzing 2,000+ employee experiences, defining the behaviors that mattered most for the C-suite
Led a {prog|manager effectiveness} initiative, turning {data|feedback data} into reports and manager activation that improved performance
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Designed and facilitated an Inclusive Leadership workshop for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Optimized onboarding processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Delivered strategic HR solutions for business priorities across projects in employee relations, headcount, and succession planning
Strengthened {ex|engagement} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training

changeLog: 2026-05-30: Tailored for Notion — Customer Success Enablement Program Manager (SF; CS enablement, program roadmap, playbooks/talk tracks, training delivery, behavior change, measurement, GTM stakeholders, Notion/LMS). Header → SF (Open to Relocation). Title noun → Strategic Program Manager. Lead InGenius (Set A enablement: own program roadmap → training/playbooks/reinforcement, design+deliver learning experiences, build playbooks/templates, measurement & feedback loops → 78% via behavior change) then NextGen (diagnose performance gaps, manager activation) then Vestas (design+facilitate workshop scaled). ODN Pair A. Skills → Enablement Systems led: LMS & Learning Platforms + Curriculum & Playbook Design + Facilitation; Notion product + Notion AI (JD names Notion + LMS/WorkRamp). JD keywords: program roadmap, playbooks, behavior change, measurement/feedback loops, facilitation, adoption, GTM stakeholders.
